scientific_question: Can A331's independently selected margin-consistency signal be fused with A329's stability-aware order under an exact factor-two oracle-regret guarantee?

operator_contract.margin_score: negative absolute difference between exact W44 and W45 nearest-prototype margins, selected by A331 without A313/A322/A325 labels
operator_contract.margin_order: descending selected margin score, then corresponding A329 base rank, then cell
operator_contract.inconsistency_control_order: ascending selected margin score, then corresponding A329 base rank, then cell
operator_contract.wavefront_order: ascending min(source ranks), then max(source ranks), rank sum, then cell
operator_contract.borda_order: ascending source-rank sum, then minimum source rank, maximum source rank, then cell

predeclared_outputs: seven exact 4096-cell W44 and W45 order pairs and uint16be hashes
zero-violation factor-two wavefront checks for consistency and inconsistency directions
cross-width Spearman for every exact pair
A313 rank annotation without operator selection
frozen consistency primary and matched inconsistency direction control
postconfirmation A322 and A325 ranks without duplicate candidate execution
